targets.query: SELECT percentile("value", 95) FROM "chat_ack_roundtrip_ms" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "workerIndex", "roomIndex" fill(null)
SELECT percentile("value", 99) FROM "chat_ack_roundtrip_ms" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "workerIndex", "roomIndex" fill(null)
SELECT percentile("value", 95) FROM "ws_visible_freshness_ms" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "workerIndex", "roomIndex" fill(null)
SELECT percentile("value", 99) FROM "ws_visible_freshness_ms" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "workerIndex", "roomIndex" fill(null)
SELECT percentile("value", 95) FROM "ws_connect_duration_ms" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "workerIndex", "roomIndex" fill(null)
SELECT percentile("value", 99) FROM "ws_connect_duration_ms" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "workerIndex", "roomIndex" fill(null)
SELECT mean("value") FROM "ws_connect_success_rate" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "workerIndex", "roomIndex" fill(null)
SELECT mean("value") FROM "ws_connect_failure_rate" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "workerIndex", "roomIndex" fill(null)
SELECT non_negative_derivative(sum("value"), 1s) FROM "ws_messages_sent_total" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "workerIndex", "roomIndex" fill(null)
SELECT non_negative_derivative(sum("value"), 1s) FROM "ws_messages_received_total" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "workerIndex", "roomIndex" fill(null)
SELECT non_negative_derivative(sum("value"), 1s) FROM "ws_frames_received_total" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "workerIndex", "roomIndex" fill(null)
SELECT non_negative_derivative(sum("value"), 1s) FROM "ws_realtime_omitted_messages_total" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "workerIndex", "roomIndex" fill(null)
